must_find.description: std::fs::read_to_string blocks the tokio runtime thread inside an async function; should use tokio::fs::read_to_string
CPU-intensive hashing runs on the async runtime thread, blocking other tasks; should use tokio::task::spawn_blocking
std::process::Command::output() blocks the runtime thread while waiting for the child process; should use tokio::process::Command
std::fs::metadata blocks the runtime thread in an async function; should use tokio::fs::metadata

must_not_flag.description: format_duration is a synchronous function performing pure computation with no I/O; blocking is not relevant here
parse_phase_number is a synchronous function doing trivial string parsing; no async context to block
